    "PEX tubing passes through concrete slab without a protective sleeve",
    "Unsleeved PEX is exposed to abrasion, concrete chemical interaction, and point-loading damage",
    "Installation does not comply with IPC slab penetration protection requirements",
    "Manufacturer warranty likely voided by direct burial/contact with uncured concrete"

  "actions": [
    "Remove or expose the affected PEX run",
    "Install a rigid, corrosion-resistant sleeve (e.g., Schedule 40 PVC) sized for free movement through the slab penetration",
    "Seal annular space to prevent concrete intrusion while allowing pipe movement",
    "Re-inspect before concrete pour or close-out"
  ],
  "rationale": "PEX tubing installed through a concrete slab must be protected by a sleeve to prevent abrasion, chemical attack from uncured concrete, and stress from slab movement. The observed unsleeved condition is a code and manufacturer non-compliance, creating a high risk of future leaks and warranty loss.",

    "IPC 305.5 / 305.6 - protection of piping materials",
    "PEX manufacturer installation instructions - sleeve requirements for concrete slab penetrations"
  ]
